description: Style NoteSupport the Boston Celtics on and off the court with this cap from adidas. Made of cotton, this cap with the eyelets on the panels ensures you stay dry and comfortable while you cheer your team to victory. The buckle at the back allows you to adjust the Fit to allow the cap to stay snug around your head, while the stylish symbol of the NBA adorns the side, giving it a stylish touch.Product DetailsEmbroidered eyelets on the crown, 'Celtics' text appliqué d on the front and embroidered Boston Celtics logo at the back and Adidas patented 3-Stripes appliqué d on the visor which is green and an adjustable back strapMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash cold waterDo not dry cleanLine dry
